satisfaction.title: Sadarkaa keessan filadhaa
satisfaction.subtitle: Waryt filachuu keessaniif galatoomaa — muuxannoo {customer} waliin akkam ture?
satisfaction.prompt: Maaloo garaa garaa gurguraa har'aa waliin qanqabaa keessan qooduuf urjii tuqaa.
satisfaction.myReviewsDescription: Sadarkaa maamilaa dhihoo daldala cufamee booda.
satisfaction.recentEmpty: Gamaaggamni hin jiru — daldala cufamee booda asitti mul'ata.
